font-size: 36px; line-height: 44px; font-weight: 590; color: #000 !important; } .regular-text, .regular-text * { color: #000 !important; } [data-ogsc] .main-container { background-color: #fff !important; 74587.subject: Kraken and Coinbase Bring Perps Onshore as BTC Tops $67K Intraday
74587.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

* **[Kraken and Coinbase](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/kraken-coinbase-perps-onshore-us-derivatives-launch)**[ bring perpetual futures onshore](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/kraken-coinbase-perps-onshore-us-derivatives-launch)

* **[Bitcoin](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/bitcoin-tops-usd67-000-to-two-week-high-after-trump-declares-us-iran-deal-complete-and-hormuz)**[ tops $67K as Trump declares US-Iran deal complete](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/bitcoin-tops-usd67-000-to-two-week-high-after-trump-declares-us-iran-deal-complete-and-hormuz)

* **[Standard Chartered](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/standard-chartered-sets-uni-2030-price-target-at-40x-current-levels)**[ calls Uniswap the RWA hub, sets $100 UNI target](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/standard-chartered-sets-uni-2030-price-target-at-40x-current-levels)

* **[ZetaChain](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/your-ai-knows-everything-about-you-zetachain-bets-on-private-ai)**[ bets on private AI ](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/your-ai-knows-everything-about-you-zetachain-bets-on-private-ai)_[[Partner]](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/your-ai-knows-everything-about-you-zetachain-bets-on-private-ai)_

* **[Sui](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/sui-65-billion-stablecoin-transfers-gasless-fee-removal)**[ clears $65B in stablecoin transfers after zeroing out fees](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/sui-65-billion-stablecoin-transfers-gasless-fee-removal)

* **[Strategy](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/strategy-buys-1-587-bitcoin-for-100m-below-its-blended-cost-basis-lifting-stack-to-846-842-btc)**[ buys 1,587 BTC for $100M below blended cost basis](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/strategy-buys-1-587-bitcoin-for-100m-below-its-blended-cost-basis-lifting-stack-to-846-842-btc)

* **[AetherStrike](https://thedefiant.io/education/research-and-opinion/the-material-holding-america-together-is-disappearing-aetherstrike-tokenized-it)**[ tokenizes the material holding US infra together](https://thedefiant.io/education/research-and-opinion/the-material-holding-america-together-is-disappearing-aetherstrike-tokenized-it)_[ [Partner]](https://thedefiant.io/education/research-and-opinion/the-material-holding-america-together-is-disappearing-aetherstrike-tokenized-it)_

74583.subject: 🚨 Your Deployment has been taken offline
74583.body: Your Emergent Deployment Status body { margin: 0; padding: 0; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; background-color: #fafafa; } .email-container { max-width: 560px; margin: 0 auto; background-color: #ffffff; padding: 50px 40px; } .content { color: #1a1a1a; line-height: 1.7; } .greeting { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; margin: 0 0 32px 0; color: #1a1a1a; } .message { font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px; color: #1a1a1a; } .cta-container { margin: 32px 0; } .cta-link { color: #0066cc; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; } .cta-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .signature { font-size: 16px; margin: 32px 0; color: #1a1a1a; } .footer { font-size: 13px; color: #999; padding-top: 30px; border-top: 1px solid #eaeaea; line-height: 1.6; } .footer-address { margin-bottom: 12px; } .unsubscribe { color: #666; text-decoration: none; } .unsubscribe:hover { text-decoration: underline; } @media only screen and (max-width: 600px) { .email-container { padding: 40px 24px; } } Hey there, We wanted to let you know that your deployment has been taken offline due to insufficient credits on Emergent. Your build is still safe. We’ll keep it backed up for the next 30 days . After that, we’ll have to discard it since inactive deployments still rack up heavy infra costs on our end. You can bring it back online anytime within that period by renewing or topping up your credits. Top up now → If you weren’t expecting this or need help, reach us at support@emergent.sh . Thanks, Team Emergent P.S. Keeping deployments online consumes significant infrastructure resources on our end, and we try hard to keep this affordable for everyone building on Emergent. Emergent Labs 2380 Via Espada Pleasanton, CA 94566-5840 USA Unsubscribe If you'd like to unsubscribe and stop receiving these emails click here
